title: Package the orchestrator skills/MCP as a versioned Claude Code plugin
source: Claude Code plugins & marketplaces: .claude-plugin/plugin.json + marketplace.json bundling skills, MCP servers, hooks (knowledge cutoff Jan 2026; live web search unavailable this run)
description: The system ships as loose scripts + a skill. Claude Code plugins bundle skills, MCP server config, hooks, and commands into one versioned, installable unit via a .claude-plugin/plugin.json and a marketplace manifest. Packaging the orchestrator as a plugin gives versioning, one-command install on other machines, declarative MCP/hook wiring, and a clean upgrade path for Prometheus self-evolution to bump versions.
proposed_changes: Create .claude-plugin/plugin.json declaring name 'cto-orchestrator', semver version, the cto-orchestrator skill path, the MCP server entry (command to launch mcp_server.py), and hook registrations. Add a marketplace.json so it can be added via /plugin marketplace add <repo>. Have prometheus.py bump the plugin.json version and append a CHANGELOG entry on each applied evolve cycle so installs are reproducible and traceable.
